cmd: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/lfortran-c-split-common-header.XXXXXX); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; lfortran --backend=c --separate-compilation -c {infile} -o "$tmpdir/main.o" && grep -R -F -q '#ifndef LFORTRAN_C_BACKEND_CONSTRUCTOR' "$tmpdir"/*.o.tmp.split/*_common_generated.h && grep -R -F -q 'struct dimension_descriptor' "$tmpdir"/*.o.tmp.split/*_common_generated.h #
